channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Buyer's remorse hits Trump's Latino voters ahead of 2026 midterms
item.description: Data: UnidosUS/BSP Research/Shaw & Company; Chart: Sara Wise/Axios One-in-four Hispanic Trump voters saying they would not vote for him again if given the chance.

item.title: OpenAI and Anthropic clash over AI's impact on white-collar jobs
item.description: Top AI CEOs are divided on whether their technology will eliminate or enhance white-collar work, but the truth...

item.title: John Thune reaches out to Ken Paxton
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune had a productive call with Ken Paxton on Wednesday after the Texas attorney general's primary win...

item.title: Texas takeaways: Trump's role in Cornyn's defeat
item.description: Ken Paxton's 28-point primary win over Sen. John Cornyn was the largest primary defeat for a sitting U.S. senator in nearly 50 years...
